problem_id: Two-Way Interoperability between the Single Window System and Department Systems
team_name: Zero-Disruption Bidirectional Sync Layer for Karnataka's Single Window System
summary: Design a bidirectional synchronization layer for Karnataka's Single Window System using Unique Business Identifier (UBID) as the common join key, ensuring zero-disruption and handling conflicts.
optimization_claims: Ensuring system stability by accepting a delay of 5 to 15 minutes for older systems
constraints_addressed: No modification to the original code or database structures of the Single Window System or the old systems
